name: 11_js_cherrypick_server_port
description: Early cherry-pick of beta + upstream rename causes rebase conflict (scenario 10)
goose_prompt_control: There is a merge conflict in server.js during rebase. Merge env-based port, upstream isSecureMode naming, and the fork diagnostic console.log. Do not leave conflict markers.
goose_prompt_experiment: There is a merge conflict in server.js. Preserve PORT handling, adopt isSecureMode, and keep fork logging. Do not leave conflict markers.
